reviews.comment: Excellent service! Mike arrived on time, was very professional, and did a fantastic job with the electrical work. The ceiling fan installation looks perfect and the flickering lights are fixed. Highly recommend!
Good work overall. Fixed the outlet issue quickly. Only minor complaint is he arrived 15 minutes late.
Saved us from a major leak! Came within an hour of calling and fixed everything. Very reasonable pricing too.
Great service from this student technician. Fixed my laptop and explained everything clearly. Will use again.
Amazing tutor! My daughter's math grades improved significantly after just a month of sessions. Patient and knowledgeable.
